subject: Re: cropping on X side of image
body:
Hey Jesse,
There is some mismatch between the data in the extended header and what warp is expecting there - a simple way to solve this would be to run each image through the imod program newstack
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On 13 Jun 2023, at 15:19, Jesse Hansen <bluufive2@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
hi all,
has anyone seen such a weird artifact (far right side of image) when importing data from falcon 4.  I checked the raw data with 3dmod and do not see this effect, so it seems to be rather something up with WARP.    
thanks
Jesse
<Screenshot from 2023-06-13 16-15-44.png>
